title: Look You, I'll Go Pray
content:
Look you, I'll go pray,
        My shame is crying,
        My soul is gray and faint,
        My faith is dying.
        Look you, I'll go pray - 
        "Sweet Mary, make me clean,
        Thou rainstorm of the soul,
        Thou wine from worlds unseen."
meaning:
This evocative piece by Vachel Lindsay, titled "Look You, I'll Go Pray", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
